news.title: A Look At KalVista Pharmaceuticals (KALV) Valuation After A Strong Year Of Share Price Gains
Stifel Downgrades KalVista Pharmaceuticals to Hold From Buy, Adjusts Price Target to $27 From $42
HC Wainwright Downgrades KalVista Pharmaceuticals to Neutral From Buy, Adjusts Price Target to $27 From $37
